top_signals.title: Citadel Securities Sees Risk of Fed Starting Hiking in September
top_signals.summary: Citadel Securities says odds are rising that the Federal Reserve will begin a series of interest-rate increases as soon as September as inflation becomes more persistent and broad-based.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Norway Moves to Extend the Life of Europe’s Most Important Oil Field
top_signals.summary: Norway is moving ahead with the next phase of development at Johan Sverdrup, a project designed to help maintain production from the oil field that has become one of Europe's most important sources of crude supply. According to Equinor, new discoveries in the Johan Sverdrup area have laid the foundation for Phase 4 of the giant North Sea field. Preliminary estimates indicate resources of around 20 million barrels of oil and approximately 30 million barrels of oil equivalent, with production expected to begin in 2029. The volumes are modest compared…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Coinbase lets users transfer stock portfolios as exchange expands beyond crypto
top_signals.summary: The crypto exchange is deepening its push into traditional finance by enabling ACATS stock transfers and expanding trading products beyond digital assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
